title: thelypteris semimetralis
intro: Thelypteris semimetralis, also known as the Mountain Shield Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Central and South America, and is often found growing in shaded areas near streams and rivers. The medicinal properties of Thelypteris semimetralis include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant is traditionally used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, are also believed to promote digestive health and reduce stress.
